title: How HRA Exemption is Calculated: The Actual Formula
description: HRA exemption is the minimum of three values — most salaried employees claim less than they're entitled to. Here's the exact formula, worked examples for metro and non-metro cities, and when HRA beats home loan interest.

title: Gratuity Calculation Formula in India: What You'll Actually Receive
description: Gratuity uses a simple formula but most employees don't know what counts as 'last drawn salary' or how the 5-year eligibility rule really works. Here's the exact calculation with worked examples.

title: EPF Interest Calculation: How PF Interest is Calculated Each Year
description: PF interest is calculated monthly but credited annually — and the way it's compounded surprises most employees. Here's exactly how your EPF balance grows, with the 2025-26 interest rate of 8.25%.

title: Capital Gains Tax in India FY 2025-26: Rates, Exemptions, Examples
description: Budget 2024 changed STCG to 20% and LTCG to 12.5% with ₹1.25 lakh exemption. Here's how capital gains tax applies to equity, mutual funds, property and gold in FY 2025-26.
target_keyword: india short term capital gains tax

title: CTC to In-Hand Salary: Why Your Take-Home is Much Less Than CTC
description: A ₹12 lakh CTC offer doesn't mean ₹1 lakh monthly take-home. After PF deductions, income tax, professional tax and gratuity provisions, the gap is usually 20-30%. Here's the exact breakdown.

title: RD Interest Calculation: How Recurring Deposit Interest Works
description: RD interest uses quarterly compounding per RBI rules — not simple interest as most people assume. Here's the actual formula, why banks show different maturity amounts, and when RD beats FD.

title: PPF Maturity Amount: How to Calculate What Your PPF Will Be Worth
description: PPF compounds annually at a rate set by the government every quarter — currently 7.1%. The 15-year lock-in and partial withdrawal rules catch most investors off guard. Here's how to calculate your actual maturity amount.

title: TDS on Salary: How Your Employer Calculates and Deducts Tax
description: Your employer deducts TDS from salary every month based on projected annual income — but most employees don't know how to check if the deduction is correct. Here's how TDS on salary is calculated.

title: Home Loan Prepayment: How Much Interest You Actually Save
description: Prepaying ₹1 lakh on a ₹40 lakh home loan in year 3 saves you roughly ₹2.4 lakh in interest over the remaining tenure. Here's the math behind prepayment and when it makes more sense than investing.

title: Reverse GST Calculation: How to Find Base Price from GST-Inclusive Amount
description: Most people calculate GST the forward way — add 18% to a price. Reverse calculation (finding the base price from a GST-inclusive bill) uses a different formula that's easy to get wrong.

title: NPS vs PPF: Which Retirement Saving Option Wins for Salaried Employees
description: NPS gives an extra ₹50,000 deduction under 80CCD(1B) but locks 40% in annuity at retirement. PPF is fully tax-free but returns 7.1%. The right answer depends on your tax slab and retirement timeline.

title: Stamp Duty and Registration Charges: State-by-State Guide for 2026
description: Stamp duty ranges from 3% in Maharashtra for women to 7% in some states for men. Registration charges add another 0.5-1%. On a ₹60 lakh property this can mean ₹4-5 lakh extra — often forgotten in budget planning.
